Work the steps in order; each depends on the one before.

1. **Competitive alternatives** — what customers would actually do without
   this product. Include "do nothing" and "spreadsheet plus willpower".
2. **Unique attributes** — what this product has or does that the
   alternatives genuinely do not.
3. **Value** — what those attributes let the customer do that matters to
   them. Attributes are facts; value is why anyone cares.
